title: Tunisian Tagine Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Tunisia, made with tender meat and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: plant based friendly tagine spice mix

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots, potatoes, and zucchini. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, vegetable broth, gfluffy, tunisian, and plant based friendly tagine spice mix.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
